steps.title: Identify the initial value
steps.content:
In a linear model of the form
$$f(x)=mx+b$$
the constant $b$ is the value when $x=0$. Here, $x$ is the number of years after the tree was first measured.

steps.title: Interpret the constant
steps.content:
For the function
$$f(x)=6x+5$$
the value when $x=0$ is
$$f(0)=6(0)+5=5$$
So $5$ represents the estimated height, in feet, when the tree was first measured. The answer is D.
